creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Fri, Apr 13, 2012 at 10:14:43 +0200, michele@buddyns.com wrote:
> Adding some steam to this :)
> 
> This PR blocks updating ports/py-django to 1.4, which introduces major features
> that are hard to wait for.
> 
> cheers
> michele

For people want to use (and test :) Django 1.4, here is the patch:

http://people.freebsd.org/~lwhsu/patch/py-django-1.4.diff
